---
title: "Keynotes & Presentations"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
toc: false
description: "Access chen.ist keynote presentations and slides on cybersecurity, zero trust architecture, and technology leadership topics."
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=/keynotes/">
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Keynotes & <span class="gr">Presentations</span></h1>
    <p>Redirecting to keynotes...</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <p>If you are not redirected automatically, please <a href="/keynotes/">click here</a>.</p>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
